/usr/lib/icecc/bin/c++   -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -O2 -g -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/memesim.dir/src/verymeme/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memesim.dir/src/verymeme/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memesim.dir/src/programs/memesim.cpp.o  -o memesim -Wl,-rpath,/home/miles/Dropbox/code/memepu/verymeme/build/verilog verilog/libverilated_library.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_stacktrace_backtrace.so
